name: Stolichnyi Salat- Table Salad or Russian Sal
recipeIngredient: 1 apple, delicious variety, cored with skin
1 green tart apple, cored with skin
½ lb chicken meat, cubed ½-inch pieces
¾ cup sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop apples without peeling them.
2. Boil potatoes until tender, drain and cut into ½-inch cubes.
3. Peel and cut carrots into rounds of ¼-inch thickness.
4. Boil peas in the salted water from the potatoes for 5 minutes, then drain.
5. Remove orange sections from membranes and cut into 1-inch chunks.
6. Mix chopped fruit and vegetables with cooked chicken cubes.
7. Press egg yolks through a sieve and mix with 2 tablespoons olive oil until smooth.
8. Stir in 2 tablespoons cider vinegar and half cup each mayonnaise and sour cream/yogurt.
9. Season to taste.
10. Pour dressing over warm vegetables, toss well, cover, and refrigerate for 8-12 hours.
11. Turn salad onto a large plate or bowl.
12. Mix remaining ingredients except parsley and dill.
13. Pour mixture over the salad and sprinkle with dill and parsley.
14. Serve on bed of lettuce leaves or red cabbage leaves.
